overall.description: A slow aerial drone shot over a misty forested landscape at dawn, likely from a high-end game engine such as Red Dead Redemption 2. The camera glides smoothly above rolling green hills and dense pine forests with atmospheric haze settling in the valley below. A flock of birds crosses the sky midway through the clip, adding life to the serene natural environment.

scattered white clouds against the pale dawn sky

segments.scene_description: The camera maintains a slow, steady aerial progression over a serene forest landscape at dawn. Dense pine forests dominate the right side while open grassy meadows stretch across the center and left. Atmospheric mist hangs in the distant valleys, partially obscuring the mountain range on the horizon. At approximately 15 seconds, a flock of birds traverses the sky, adding movement to the otherwise tranquil scene. The warm, diffused light suggests early morning, casting long soft shadows across the terrain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a steady aerial progression over a serene forest landscape that gradually reveals the scale of a misty mountain range at dawn. It begins gliding over a composition of dense pine forests to the right and open grassy meadows to the left, bathed in the warm, diffused light of early morning. As the camera maintains its forward momentum, a flock of birds traverses the sky, introducing a sense of life to the tranquil environment. The scene then expands toward the horizon, where atmospheric mist settles into the distant valleys and partially obscures the looming peaks. Finally, the movement continues over the rolling terrain, casting long, soft shadows across the greenery under the waking sun.
